dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION NOTE: CONTAINS BENZYL ALCOHOL ( see PRECAUTIONS ). Parenteral drug products should be inspected visually for particulate matter and discoloration prior to administration whenever solution and container permit. For single-dose vials only, discard unused portion. Glycopyrrolate injection may be administered intramuscularly, or intravenously, without dilution, in the following indications. Adults PREANESTHETIC MEDICATION The recommended dose of glycopyrrolate injection is
